mapper.select: SELECT user_id , alarm_dt , alarm_seq , fcm_title , fcm_body , fcm_data , menu_id , clnt_id , null as write_year , write_dt , doc_no , null as doc_type , read_yn , read_at , created_at , created_by , updated_at , updated_by FROM esg.tb_notice_alarm_his WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT user_id , alarm_dt , alarm_seq , fcm_title , fcm_body , fcm_data , null as menu_id , null as clnt_id , null as write_year , null as write_dt , null as doc_no , null as doc_type , read_yn , read_at , created_at , created_by , updated_at , updated_by FROM esg.tb_emergency_alarm_his WHERE user_id = #{userId} UNION ALL SELECT user_id , alarm_dt , alarm_seq , fcm_title , fcm_body , fcm_data , menu_id , null as clnt_id , write_year , null as write_dt , doc_no , doc_type , read_yn , read_at , created_at , created_by , updated_at , updated_by FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_alarm_his WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY read_yn asc, alarm_seq asc
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(alarm_seq), 0) + 1 AS alarmSeq FROM esg.tb_emergency_alarm_his WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND alarm_dt = #{alarmDt} --날짜지날때마다 seq초기화 되야함
INSERT INTO esg.tb_emergency_alarm_his ( user_id, alarm_dt, alarm_seq, fcm_title, fcm_body, read_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{alarmDt}, #{alarmSeq}, #{fcmTitle}, #{fcmBody}, 'N', NOW(), -- created_at #{createdBy} );
mapper.select: select b.user_id from esg.tb_hr_info a left join esg.tb_user_info b on a.user_id = b.user_id left join esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map c on a.hr_id = c.hr_id where b.fcm_token is not null and c.comp_id = #{compId} and b.user_id = #{userId} and c.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'

select b.user_id, b.user_nm, d.orgn_nm, e.jbrp_nm FROM esg.tb_hr_info a LEFT JOIN esg.tb_user_info b ON a.user_id = b.user_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_comp_map c ON a.hr_id = c.hr_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_orgn_info d ON c.comp_id = d.comp_id AND a.orgn_id = d.orgn_id LEFT JOIN esg.tb_hr_info_jbrp e ON c.comp_id = e.comp_id AND a.jbrp = e.jbrp_id WHERE b.fcm_token is not null AND c.comp_id = #{compId} AND b.user_id in ( select unnest(string_to_array(#{userId}, ',')) ) AND c.orgn_comp_yn = 'Y'
mapper.insert:
SELECT COALESCE(MAX(alarm_seq), 0) + 1 AS alarmSeq FROM esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_alarm_his WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND alarm_dt = #{alarmDt} --날짜지날때마다 seq초기화 되야함
INSERT INTO esg.tb_training_plan_implementation_alarm_his ( user_id, alarm_dt, alarm_seq, fcm_title, fcm_body, menu_id, write_year, doc_type, doc_no, read_yn, created_at, created_by ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{alarmDt}, #{alarmSeq}, #{fcmTitle}, #{fcmBody}, #{menuId}, #{writeYear}, #{docType}, #{docNo}, 'N', NOW(), -- created_at #{createdBy} );
